title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 261.100 - Animal export inspection facilities, operation
text:
261.100.  Animal export inspection facilities, operation. — Within the limit of funds specifically appropriated for that purpose, the director of the department of agriculture may operate an animal export inspection facility meeting the requirements of the United States Department of Agriculture for animal inspection prior to export shipments.
(L. 1979 S.B. 47 § 2)
